payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE - Milestone B assembled. Already-landed: PG store+replay behind serving (tenant replicas), hosted OIDC/API-key auth, schema+RLS on boot. This tranche wired the remaining two: (1) LISTEN/NOTIFY fan-out - makePgBus on hosted boot; writes publish {tenant,cursor} pointers; each SSE connection LISTENs on its tenant topic and replays into the local bus, so multi-instance viewers converge (single-instance unaffected); (2) quotas - ensureQuotaSchema on boot, per-principal/tenant rate limiting on the API (429 + Retry-After), daily event quota enforced on sync push AND replica mutations (429 QUOTA_EVENTS) with recordEvents accounting, per-tenant SSE connection ceiling (429 QUOTA_CONNECTIONS), and GET /api/usage. Note: fly.toml still pins min_machines_running=1; the bus makes >1 safe for realtime, but scaling out remains a deploy decision.
